ddls:
CREATE TABLE "growth_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth standard */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category (e.g., XX-Small, X-Small) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the standard (e.g., 0–3 Month) */,
  "height_in_min" REAL /* Minimum height in inches for the age group */,
  "height_in_max" REAL /* Maximum height in inches for the age group */,
  "height_cm_min" REAL /* Minimum height in centimeters for the age group */,
  "height_cm_max" REAL /* Maximum height in centimeters for the age group */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Average weight in kilograms for the age group */,
  "weight_lbs" REAL /* Average weight in pounds for the age group */,
  "unit_system" TEXT /* Unit system used for the growth standard */,
  "growth_parameter" TEXT /* Growth parameter measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infants" (
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the infant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the infant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the infant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the infant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the infant */,
  "birth_length" REAL /* Birth length of the infant */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Birth weight of the infant */,
  "gestational_age" INTEGER /* Gestational age of the infant at birth */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the infant's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infants_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infant whose growth is being recorded */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the growth record was taken */,
  "height_in" REAL /* Height of the infant in inches */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the infant in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the infant in kilograms */,
  "weight_lbs" REAL /* Weight of the infant in pounds */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth standard used for comparison */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the infant's growth */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the growth record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES growth_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent or guardian */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent or guardian */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the infant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, parent, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or area of expertise of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infant for whom the alert was generated */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., underweight, overweight) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address of the user to whom the alert was sent */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)
